response.overview: The only TV animation series created by legendary Japanese anime director Satoshi Kon. Tsukiko Sagi, a shy character designer, is attacked by a mysterious roller boy with a baseball bat. Similar incidents occur one after another and all victims have been under extreme pressure before they are assaulted. Does the roller boy exist? Or it is just a pipe dream for people to escape from reality?
response.title: Paranoia Agent Part 1
